answers.question: What does Hicks Consulting do?
answers.answer: Hicks Consulting helps Black women heal beyond survival, break unhealthy cycles, and build healthier, more fulfilling lives through virtual therapy, coaching, and mental health support.

answers.question: Who does Hicks Consulting specialize in helping?
answers.answer: Hicks Consulting was created with Black women in mind and specializes in supporting Black women, while also serving clients of all ethnicities through therapy, coaching, groups, consulting, and organizational training.

answers.question: Are services in person?
answers.answer: Therapy, coaching, and support groups are virtual. Hicks Consulting offers in-person trainings for organizations.

answers.question: How do I book with Hicks Consulting?
answers.answer: Therapy and coaching consults can be booked through SimplePractice at https://monika-hicks.clientsecure.me/.
